title: X-Bar Theory
description: Adds growable battle towers to Minecraft!
body:
# X-Bar Theory

A mod adding growable ~~tree dungeons~~ battle towers!

This mod originally aimed to implement giant tree dungeons, but \#flirora lost motivation for 2 whole months when they
had to implement tree branches.

To start, obtain a **Heart of the Skies** from an ominous vault in a trial chamber. Apply it on a block of stone bricks,
and
a tower will pop up! Make sure to do this away from any builds you care about, since it’ll be huge.

The tower contains many trial spawners, which have a chance of dropping **Celestial Tokens** when you finish the trial.
Or if you complete an ominous trial, they might drop the rarer **Auroran Tokens** instead. These can be spent at the
**Celestial Nexus** that generates at the heart of the tower.
